name: CI

on:
  pull_request:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  package-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Zip Lambda (check)
        run: |
          cd src/lambda_ingest
          zip -r ../../lambda.zip . -x "*__pycache__*" "*.pytest_cache*"
          ls -lh ../../lambda.zip

      - name: Validate SQL exists
        run: |
          test -f athena/dml/insert_curated_messages.sql
          echo "SQL OK"

      - name: Validate Glue script exists
        run: |
          test -f glue/python_shell/runner.py
          echo "Glue script OK"
